caption: A minimalist logo animation features a blue, three-dimensional geometric cube and accompanying text on a plain white background. The logo consists of a stylized blue cube with a hollow center and the text "the CUBE" positioned directly beneath it, where the "e" in "the" is stylized as a small epsilon symbol. In the initial sequence, the logo remains static and centered. Subsequently, the logo begins to shrink and shift its position toward the center-right of the screen. As the logo recedes, a solid gray rectangular block slides up from the bottom of the frame, partially covering the lower portion of the screen while the logo continues to diminish in size.
